title: Neottia nidus-avis lusus sulphurea

The exact composition and proportions of these active constituents may vary depending on the source and growing conditions of the plant. Further research is necessary to fully understand the pharmacological effects of these compounds. The isolation and characterization of these active constituents continue to be the subject of ongoing scientific studies.
parts: Neottia nidus-avis lusus sulphurea is a rare variant of the orchid species Neottia nidus-avis. Unfortunately, information on its medicinal parts is limited. However, Neottia nidus-avis itself is known to be used in traditional medicine, where its roots are used for medicinal purposes. The roots of Neottia nidus-avis are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Further research is needed to confirm the specific medicinal properties of Neottia nidus-avis lusus sulphurea.
side_effects: Neottia nidus-avis lusus sulphurea is a rare variant of the Neottia nidus-avis orchid, and limited information is available about its side effects.
